title: Project Nexus
description: A new game from SyKoNetwork. Something big is brewing — details coming soon.

title: Hex Tac Toe
description: A strategic twist on the classic game Tic Tac Toe.

title: Ender Elevators
description: A Minecraft Bedrock addon for seamless vertical transportation using ender pearls. Features multi-floor elevator systems with smooth teleportation mechanics.

title: Dungeon Expanse
description: A Minecraft Bedrock dungeon expansion addon that generates vast underground structures with custom rooms, traps, and loot.

title: Compressed Crafting
description: Compressed block crafting for Minecraft Bedrock. Store more resources in less space with compressed variants of common blocks.

title: Survival Miner
description: Enhanced mining experience for Minecraft Bedrock by adding vein mining and custom tools.

title: Crazy Caves
description: Expanded cave generation for Minecraft Bedrock. Added before the official caves and cliffs update, featuring new "cave biomes", formations, and underground features.

title: PaintBall+
description: A paintball minigame for Minecraft Bedrock. Team-based competitive gameplay with custom arenas and power-ups.

title: The Little Things
description: Quality of life improvements for Minecraft Bedrock. Small tweaks that make a big difference — adding uncrafting recipes for most of the crafted items.
